/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,interfaz_temp_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/interfaz_temp/interfaz_temp_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/interfaz_temp__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/interfaz_temp/_interfaz_temp_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/ros2_ws/build/interfaz_temp/rosidl_generator_py/interfaz_temp:/workspace/ros2_ws/build/interfaz_temp:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/interfaz_temp/libinterfaz_temp__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libinterfaz_temp__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libinterfaz_temp__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libinterfaz_temp__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
